title: TIAgent: Complex CPath Workflows in Natural Language
summary: The Tissue Image Analytics Agent is a multi-agent system that enables verified, task aligned, and sharable workflows for computational pathology.

title: The ORCHID dataset
summary: The ORal Cancer Histology Dataset: A comprehensive histopathology dataset for ML in Oral Cancer grade and stage detection.

title: Oral Cancer Classifier
summary: Grade-level classification of oral squamous cell carcinoma from histopathology using deep-learning algorithms.

title: CODA-TB DREAM
summary: We participated in a DREAM challenge to use audio recordings of cough to diagnose the presence of Tuberculosos in a patient.

title: Animal Tracking
summary: Tracking positional movement of Wild-type Zebrafish (Danio Rerio) to examine behavioural patterns using Computer Vision.

title: Improved Latent Diffusion Models
summary: Improving text-conditioned latent diffusion models for breast cancer histopathology in a large scale cohort.
